creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #6)

Totally unrelated to this, poudriere has been stalling on the following parts of the recent porttree.
(I have contacted the people who committed the changes here.)
If you add it from the side of a running poudriere, it may accelerate next time :)

diff --git a/Mk/Uses/pyqt.mk b/Mk/Uses/pyqt.mk
index 51d41f0b6..602dc0111 100644
--- a/Mk/Uses/pyqt.mk
+++ b/Mk/Uses/pyqt.mk
@@ -174,7 +174,7 @@ post-patch:

 .    if !target(do-build)
 do-build:
-	(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SIP} ${SIP_ARGS}; ${MAKE} -C ./build)
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SIP} ${SIP_ARGS}; ${MAKE} ${_MAKE_JOBS} -C ./build)

 .    endif  # !target(do-build)
